name: claude-code-cache-fix
description: Cache optimization for Claude Code in VS Code. Proxy mode (v3.0+) or preload interceptor. Fixes prompt cache bugs that cause excessive quota burn.

commands.title: Claude Code Cache Fix: Show Status
Claude Code Cache Fix: Enable Proxy Mode (recommended for CC v2.1.113+)
Claude Code Cache Fix: Disable Proxy Mode

claude-code-cache-fix.stripGitStatus.description: Strip volatile git-status from system prompt for prefix stability (opt-in)

claude-code-cache-fix.outputEfficiencyRe.description: Replace Claude Code's '# Output efficiency' system prompt section with custom text. Leave empty to use default. WARNING: This modifies the model's system prompt.

claude-code-cache-fix.imageKeepLast.description: Strip base64 images from tool results older than N user turns (0 = disabled)

claude-code-cache-fix.normalizeIdentity.description: Normalize subagent identity string for cache parity between Agent() and SendMessage() calls (opt-in)

claude-code-cache-fix.normalizeCwd.description: Replace volatile CWD and path references with stable placeholders for cross-worktree cache reuse (opt-in)

claude-code-cache-fix.normalizeSmoosh.description: Normalize dynamic system-reminder values (token usage, budget, output tokens, todo reminder) for cache stability (opt-in)

claude-code-cache-fix.prefixDiff.description: Save prefix snapshots for cross-session diffing to ~/.claude/cache-fix-snapshots/ (diagnostic)

claude-code-cache-fix.skipRelocate.description: Disable the block relocation fix (relocates skills/plugins to messages[0])

claude-code-cache-fix.skipToolSort.description: Disable the tool schema sort fix

claude-code-cache-fix.skipSmooshSplit.description: Disable the smoosh/split fix (peels system-reminders from tool results)

claude-code-cache-fix.skipSessionStartNo.description: Disable session start normalization (startup vs resume consistency)

claude-code-cache-fix.skipDeferredToolsR.description: Disable the deferred tools restore fix (MCP reconnect race)

claude-code-cache-fix.skipReminderStrip.description: Disable the bookkeeping reminder strip fix
